description: Contracts that rely on a single administrative key (EOA or contract) without multisig, timelock, or key rotation create a single point of failure. Compromise of that key (phishing, malware, physical theft) gives full control; loss of the key (e.g., no backup) can permanently lock critical functions. SCWE-129 covers single EOA admin; this weakness focuses on the *risk* of single-key design and the absence of mitigations.
name: Single Point of Failure in Administrative Key Management
remediation: - Use multisig wallets (e.g., Gnosis Safe) for administrative actions. - Implement timelocks for sensitive operations (SCWE-020). - Plan for key rotation or recovery mechanisms.
